nasb.text: Therefore He also says in another Psalm, ‘You will not allow Your Holy One to undergo decay.’

esv.text: Therefore he says also in another psalm, “‘You will not let your Holy One see corruption.’

cnv.text: 所以他在另一篇說： ‘你必不容你的聖者見朽壞。’

ccb.text: 又在诗篇上说， “‘你必不让你的圣者身体朽坏。’

csbs.text: 所以在另外一处也说：‘你不会让你的圣者经历腐朽。’
